result.changes_detected: UI updated - new type options (social, graphic), new generation URL pattern gamma.app/create/generate/{id}
result.response_format: GraphQL JSON via HTTP/2 fetch AND WebSocket

observations.ai_generation_flow: Outline generation uses api.gamma.app/graphql (fetch, h2, 200) returning 2.6kB JSON
observations.telemetry: track-span requests to Cloudflare (204 preflight, 200/201 actual)
observations.third_party: LaunchDarkly feature flags, Stripe, Intercom, DataDog logging
observations.no_sse_observed: No text/event-stream (SSE) responses detected - all GraphQL JSON

result.block_feasibility: POSSIBLE via HTTP/2 interception of api.gamma.app/graphql, but WebSocket also carries AI data

notes: Gamma AI generation now routes through api.gamma.app/graphql (both HTTP fetch and WebSocket). Previous ai.api.gamma.app endpoint was NOT observed. SSE format NOT detected - responses are standard GraphQL JSON. WebSocket connections are persistent and may carry real-time generation updates.
